verified_points: Scope is limited to web UI HTML, CSS, JavaScript and UI tests.
No runtime, adapter or server files are modified.
Persistent sidebar navigation exposes only overview, accounts, diagnostics and settings.
Setup, select-client and import-existing remain accepted by direct screen routes and render inert disabled UI.
Deferred setup/select/import screens do not expose file inputs, data-ui-action controls, live actions or path payloads.
Overview has one primary overview CTA: launchClientAction.
Other overview actions are visually ghost or secondary.
Action panel appears after system, mode, KPI and event sections.
False-green and error handling remain intact.
ui_action POST payload, JSON keys, machine codes and allowlist-sensitive server surfaces appear unchanged.
No private external reference-service traces were found in the tracked diff or contour artifacts.
auditor_commands_reported: git diff on modified UI/test files
rg/sed/nl inspections for nav, route, action, payload and trace surfaces
auditor_residual_risk: Audit was static plus lightweight unittest coverage; auditor did not run live browser or pixel verification.
orchestrator_resolution: The orchestrator ran system Google Chrome via Playwright against the local fake-runner server and recorded the passing browser smoke artifact.
